title: The eighth gap the first audit missed: scribing's own reference still teaches docs/specs as the unconditional state layer
action: A verification re-audit after f4-1..f4-4 confirmed all seven original gaps closed and found an EIGHTH of exactly the same class — a file a skill DEFERS to rather than a file a skill IS. `skills/bee-scribing/references/scribing-reference.md` mentions `docs/knowledge` ZERO times and `docs/specs` SEVEN times (measured), and `skills/bee-scribing/SKILL.md:218` still points readers there for 'full spec template, per-section rules'. It presents the area-spec template unconditionally — 'Path: `docs/specs/<area>.md`' and '`docs/specs/` holds ONLY the state layer: area specs, system-overview.md, reading-map.md, visuals/' — plus a sync-mode merge rule that resolves every delta through `docs/specs/reading-map.md`, and a system-overview section calling that file what fresh sessions read FIRST. This is the worst remaining instance of the class, because bee-scribing is THE skill that writes the state layer: its SKILL.md body correctly routes through the bundle predicate, then hands the reader a reference that contradicts it. FIX with the same both-branches treatment f4-1 applied, mirroring `bee-scribing/SKILL.md`'s own wording (read it first — its §2/§2a already state the law; do NOT invent a third phrasing): every passage naming `docs/specs/` as the state layer gains a bundle branch naming `docs/knowledge/areas/<area>/` and the concept template that lives at `docs/knowledge/areas/okf-profile/concept-model-and-authoring.md` §Templates, while the no-bundle branch states today's guidance unchanged. Say once, explicitly, that with a bundle `docs/specs/` is the READ-ONLY compatibility surface. ALSO check the sibling references of the other skills the re-audit did not flag, and fix any with the same unconditional framing. SECOND, low-severity: `AGENTS.md` step 6 says 'If `docs/history/learnings/critical-patterns.md` exists, read it before any planning or execution work' with no bundle branch — give it the same treatment the preamble digest got (bundle: the bundle's own critical patterns; no bundle: unchanged). While there, fix the stale self-citation INSIDE `docs/history/learnings/critical-patterns.md`, which cites 'AGENTS.md step 5' for an instruction that now lives at step 6. Do NOT rewrite the stub otherwise (D20).

truths: no passage in that reference presents docs/specs/<area>.md as the state layer without a bundle branch beside it
every no-bundle branch states today's guidance unchanged, so a never-migrated host reads identical instructions
AGENTS.md step 6 carries both branches; the critical-patterns stub's stale 'step 5' citation is corrected
node scripts/run_verify.mjs exits 0, AND BEE_AGENT_NAME=w-test node scripts/run_verify.mjs also exits 0
prohibitions: never restate the bundle predicate in new prose of your own — mirror bee-scribing/SKILL.md §2
do not rewrite the critical-patterns pointer stub beyond the stale step citation (D20)
no new content written under docs/specs/
if you touch anything under skills/, regenerate the plugin trees and write the release manifest, then re-run the full chain as the LAST action

trace.outcome: Closed the eighth and ninth instances of the deferred-to-reference class, both found only because a verification re-audit MEASURED instead of reading. bee-scribing's own reference — the file the skill that writes the state layer points its reader to for the full template — carried the bundle 0 times and docs/specs 7 times, teaching docs/specs/<area>.md as the unconditional state layer while the SKILL body routed through the bundle predicate. Now both-branched at six points. The worker then found a ninth: grooming-reference's Fresh Session Test still pointed Q1/Q2 unconditionally at the compatibility surface even though the same file's entropy prose had been branched in f4-2. AGENTS.md step 6 and its render template gained the same treatment, and the pointer stub's stale self-citation was corrected — the orchestrator additionally caught that the stub still QUOTED the pre-change step text and claimed it 'still resolves through this path', which stopped being true the moment step 6 branched. Legacy anchor citations into doctrine-layer left alone: those resolve through the stub as designed. Chain green both with and without the agent-name prefix.
trace.verification_evidence:
{
  "red_failure_evidence": "BEFORE (measured on HEAD 9393205, AFTER the seven original gaps were already closed and committed): `grep -c 'docs/knowledge' skills/bee-scribing/references/scribing-reference.md` = 0, against 7 for docs/specs. This file presented the area-spec template unconditionally — 'Path: docs/specs/<area>.md' and 'docs/specs/ holds ONLY the state layer: area specs, system-overview.md, reading-map.md, visuals/' — plus a sync-mode merge rule resolving every delta through docs/specs/reading-map.md and a system-overview section calling that file what fresh sessions read FIRST. It is the file bee-scribing/SKILL.md itself points to for 'full spec template, per-section rules', so the skill that WRITES the state layer routed its own reader to a document contradicting its own body. Separately, AGENTS.md step 6 read 'If docs/history/learnings/critical-patterns.md exists, read it before any planning or execution work' with no bundle branch, and the pointer stub it names cited that instruction as 'AGENTS.md step 5' — an off-by-one from a later inserted step.",
  "how_it_was_found": "A VERIFICATION re-audit dispatched after f4-1..f4-4 were committed, precisely because the lesson this feature had just recorded is 'audit the instruction layer by measurement, not by reading'. The first audit had read for meaning and missed this file; the second measured every skills/**/references/*.md and found it. The eighth gap is the same class as the first seven — a file a skill DEFERS to rather than a file a skill IS — which is the class the promoted pattern names as the one review never opens.",
  "after": "AFTER: scribing-reference.md carries docs/knowledge 4 times, with both-branches treatment at six points (top-of-file summary, Area Spec Template, sync-mode Merge Rules, Bootstrap Mode, System Overview Spec, Reading Map). AGENTS.md step 6 carries both branches, mirroring routing-and-contracts.md's already-accepted wording verbatim, and skills/bee-hive/templates/AGENTS.block.md — the template the root file renders from — was kept byte-consistent (verified independently by the orchestrator with a diff of the changed passage).",
  "ninth_gap_found_by_worker": "The worker checked every other skill's references as instructed and found a NINTH instance the re-audit had also missed: grooming-reference.md's Fresh Session Test table (Q1 'What is this system?' / Q2 'How is it organized?') still pointed unconditionally at docs/specs/system-overview.md and reading-map.md, even though the entropy-check prose in the SAME file had been correctly branched in f4-2. Fixed with a bundle branch naming the generated indexes and the one-command fix. docs/knowledge count there is now 2. This is outside the cell's declared files array and the worker flagged it plainly; accepted as in-scope because the cell's action explicitly commissions checking sibling references.",
  "left_untouched_deliberately": "bee-executing/worker-details.md and bee-planning/planning-reference.md each carry exactly one docs/specs/doctrine-layer.md R17 citation. These are LEGACY ANCHOR citations that resolve through that file's pointer stub to the concept owning the anchor — the compatibility surface working as designed, not misrouting. Correctly left alone.",
  "orchestrator_correction": "The orchestrator found one thing the worker missed and fixed it directly: the pointer stub still QUOTED the pre-change text of AGENTS.md step 6 and asserted that step 'still resolves through this path'. With step 6 now branching, that claim is false in bundle mode — the stub was describing a world one commit old. Rewritten to state both branches accurately while leaving the rest of the stub untouched (D20).",
  "chain": "Both invocations re-run INDEPENDENTLY by the orchestrator after its own correction, not accepted on the worker's word: `BEE_AGENT_NAME=w-test node scripts/run_verify.mjs` -> PASS 79 suite(s) exit 0, and `node scripts/run_verify.mjs` -> PASS 79 suite(s) exit 0. Both ways green is the standing property f4-4 established."
}
